company.name: Nike Product Intelligence
company.description: Local demo company that coordinates agentic Scrapy + Zyte API product extraction for public Nike pages.

agents.name: Coordinator
agents.title: Coordinator
agents.capabilities: Routes work between build mode and run mode, requests approval for schema/build changes, and escalates only structural scraper drift to ScrapyBuilder.

agents.name: ScrapyBuilder
agents.title: Scrapy Builder
agents.capabilities: Runs Zyte Claude skills only for new websites, schema changes, or structural drift repairs. Does not run for routine crawls.

agents.name: QAReviewer
agents.title: QA Reviewer
agents.capabilities: Reviews crawl outputs, Spidermon failures, and health reports; diagnoses field completeness, duplicate URLs, parser drift, and decides whether repair can be local or needs ScrapyBuilder.

agents.name: Monitor
agents.title: Catalog Health Monitor
agents.capabilities: Runs existing spiders through scripts/monitor-nike-crawl.sh, confirms real Spidermon close-monitor results, records health reports, and opens QA repair issues when quality drops.

agents.name: CostAnalyst
agents.title: Scrapy Cost Analyst
agents.capabilities: Runs /scrapy-cost-analysis when available or scripts/run-scrapy-cost-analysis.sh locally; reviews browser rendering, Zyte API automation, retries, duplicate crawling, pagination scope, and job stats before deployment or when spend rises.

issues.title: Approve Nike product extraction schema
issues.description: Use docs/product-schema.md as the intended schema. The builder must generate a review page and request approval before code generation.

issues.title: Generate Scrapy + Zyte API project through Zyte Claude skills
issues.description: Build mode only. Run prompts/zyte-skill-pipeline.md from the demo workspace for a new site or schema change. Do not run this for routine Nike crawls.

issues.title: Validate generated fixtures and sample crawl
issues.description: QA mode. Run ./scripts/validate-scrapy-output.sh, inspect Spidermon output, outputs/nike/latest/products.jsonl, and reports/nike/latest-health.json, then decide pass, QA repair, or ScrapyBuilder rebuild.

issues.title: Review Nike spider Zyte API cost profile
issues.description: Cost mode. Prefer /scrapy-cost-analysis if the Zyte Claude Code skill is installed; otherwise run ./scripts/run-scrapy-cost-analysis.sh. Confirm browserHtml usage, retry amplification, duplicate crawling, request/item ratio, and highest-impact cost reductions before deployment.

routine.title: Daily Nike Catalog Health Check
routine.description: Run ./scripts/monitor-nike-crawl.sh against the existing Nike spider, including the real Spidermon close-monitor suite. Do not call ScrapyBuilder unless the health report points to structural parser/site drift.
